supervisor.reason: The PLAN-gated loop termination slice is complete: supervisor approval now requires all prompt-derived PLAN tasks to be complete, loop sessions seed PLAN from the active request prompt, and focused supervisor plus loop/CLI validation passed.

bootstrap.goal: Keep the supervised loop running until the prompt-derived PLAN.md checklist is actually completed.

tasks.resume_checkpoint: Resume after the PLAN-gated loop termination slice. dormammu now keeps the supervised loop running until prompt-derived PLAN.md tasks are checked off, initializes loop session state from the active request prompt so PLAN reflects the real task, and passes tests.test_supervisor, tests.test_loop_runner, and tests.test_cli.

items.text: Phase 1. Add a supervisor approval check that keeps the loop running until the prompt-derived PLAN.md checklist is fully completed
Phase 2. Ensure loop sessions initialize bootstrap state from the active request prompt so PLAN.md reflects the real task for the current run
Phase 3. Update loop and CLI regression fakes so successful attempts also complete the session PLAN.md checklist and satisfy the stricter exit rule
Phase 4. Extend supervisor coverage to prove approval is blocked while PLAN items remain incomplete even if other completion evidence exists
Phase 5. Run focused validation for supervisor, loop-runner, and CLI flows with the stricter PLAN-gated termination logic

next_action: Prepare a commit for the validated PLAN-gated loop termination change, or refine the policy if some PLAN item classes should be allowed to remain open at approval time.
notes: Treat this file as machine truth and keep Markdown synchronized.
DASHBOARD.md should show the actual progress of the active scope.
PLAN.md should list prompt-derived development items in `[ ] Phase N. <title>` format.
The installed guidance bundle and packaged asset copy should stay synchronized.
Legacy TASKS.md snapshots should be migrated forward into PLAN.md without losing checklist state.
This slice targets PLAN-gated supervisor approval for the supervised loop.
Supervisor now refuses approval while prompt-derived PLAN tasks remain incomplete.
Loop runner now seeds bootstrap state from the active request prompt so PLAN.md reflects the real loop task.
Loop and CLI regression fakes now mark PLAN.md complete on successful attempts so the stricter exit rule is exercised end-to-end.
Focused validation passed through `python3 -m unittest tests.test_supervisor`.
Loop runner validation passed through `python3 -m unittest tests.test_loop_runner`.
CLI validation passed through `python3 -m unittest tests.test_cli`.
